creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
Hi Roelof,

Your report is too vague for anyone who is _not_ in Europe to look into
it for you. :-)

Specifically, could you please provide detail on exactly what the
failure "stating that one must give a certain parameter when outside the
US" is?

This will give us a clue as to where we should start looking. I'm
outisde the US, but not in Europe, and I haven't seen this problem
myself.

Thanks,
Sheldon.
